ensures.text: x in SeqToSet(s) <==> exists k: int {:trigger s[k]} | 0 <= k < |s| :: s[k] == x
x in SeqToSet(s) <==> exists k: int {:trigger s[k]} | 0 <= k < |s| :: s[k] == x

assertions.text: forall c2: int {:trigger c2 in S2} | c2 in S2 :: m > c2
forall c2: int {:trigger {c2}} {:trigger c2 in S2} | c2 in S2 :: if m > c2 then Player1CanWin(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, |S2| - 1) else Player1CanWin(S1 - {m}, S2 + {m}, |S2| - 1)

requires.text: forall x: int {:trigger x in S2} | x in S2 :: x < m
forall x: int {:trigger x in S2} | x in S2 :: x < m
forall x: int {:trigger x in S1} | x in S1 :: x < m
forall x: int {:trigger x in S1} | x in S1 :: x < m

invariants.text: forall k: int {:trigger a[k]} | 0 <= k < i :: a[k] <= maxA
exists k: int {:trigger a[k]} | 0 <= k < i :: a[k] == maxA
forall k: int {:trigger b[k]} | 0 <= k < j :: b[k] <= maxB
exists k: int {:trigger b[k]} | 0 <= k < j :: b[k] == maxB

assertions.text: forall x: int {:trigger x in SeqToSet(b)} | x in SeqToSet(b) :: x < maxA
forall x: int {:trigger x in SeqToSet(a)} | x in SeqToSet(a) :: x < maxB
